name: Find Familiar

components.material: burning incense worth 10+ GP, consumed by the spell

description: You gain the service of a familiar — a spirit that takes an animal form you choose (Bat, Cat, Crab, Frog/Toad, Hawk, Lizard, Octopus, Owl, Poisonous Snake, Fish, Rat, Raven, Sea Horse, Spider, or Weasel). It acts independently but always obeys your commands; the familiar can deliver touch spells you cast and is a useful scout and message-bearer. When the familiar drops to 0 HP it vanishes, leaving behind no physical form, and you can re-summon it by casting this spell again.
